# YachtInsurance.co.nz

> New Zealand's yacht and marine insurance comparison service

## About
YachtInsurance.co.nz helps New Zealand boat owners compare yacht and marine insurance from leading providers. We offer free, no-obligation quotes and expert guidance on marine insurance coverage. Our service is independent and ICNZ-registered, comparing policies from providers like Mariner, Nautilus Marine Insurance, Tower, AMI, Gallagher, Baileys, NZI, and Star Insurance.

## Services
- Yacht insurance comparison and quotes
- Jet ski and personal watercraft insurance
- Dinghy and small vessel insurance
- Tender and RIB insurance
- Racing boat and regatta coverage
- Coastal cruising insurance
- Blue water cruiser and offshore passage insurance

## Coverage Types
- Hull and machinery protection
- Third-party liability
- Personal effects and equipment
- Storm and weather damage
- Theft and vandalism
- Salvage and wreck removal
- Racing cover
- Transit and trailer cover

## Vessel Types Covered
- Sailing yachts (keelboats, catamarans)
- Motor yachts and launches
- Jet skis and personal watercraft
- Dinghies (sailing and inflatable)
- Tenders and RIBs
- Racing boats
- Coastal cruising vessels
- Blue water cruisers

## Location
New Zealand (nationwide service)

## Regulatory
- ICNZ (Insurance Council of New Zealand) registered referral service
- FSP compliant
- Operated by Cover4You
